_comment: xRTOS name overlay. Task/object names that cannot be captured in-stream go here. Task names emitted via xRTOS_TRACE_NAME at object-creation time take precedence over this file. TimerDaemon (task_id=30) is created inside xRTOS_Kernel_Init before xRTOS_Kernel_Trace_Init is called, so its name cannot appear in-stream.
